message:
feat(sync): implement SSH connectivity and transport layer

Add SSHClient with:
- Multi-authentication: ssh-agent, key files (ed25519, ecdsa, rsa)
- SFTP file operations (read, write, stat, mkdir, list)
- TOFU (Trust On First Use) host key verification
- Comprehensive error types with timeout/auth/network detection

Add ConnectionPool for connection reuse across operations.

Includes comprehensive unit tests for error handling, connection
pool operations, and connectivity testing structures.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
